notes: UI polish — HUD KPI tiles + critical-salience ladder + NOW-tab severity dot. (1) DEAD-CLASS FIX: .kpi/.kpi-row/.kpi-label/.kpi-val and badge-red/badge-gold/badge-violet were defined ONLY inside the print/PDF export strings (light-mode), so the live DOCUMENT RECONCILE + PRE-FLIGHT panels rendered unstyled KPI tiles and colorless severity badges on the dark void. Promoted kpi/* to live dark CSS (framed HUD tiles: --hud-glass-soft fill, --hud-edge-cyan border, --hud-r8, mono uppercase --hud-track-wide label, --fs-hero tabular-nums value) and swapped the three dark-DOM badge sites (reconcile bcls + REVIEW chip, preflight NO-GO/ADVISORY) from the orphan badge-red/gold/violet to the live frosted .b-red/.b-gold/.b-mag pills. Print/export badge defs (L15049/L29165) left untouched — correct for white paper. (2) CRITICAL SALIENCE LADDER: .kpi-val.kpi-crit (red + --hud-glow-red text-shadow + 2s critBreath keyframe), .kpi-warn (gold), .kpi-ok (green-neon); reconcile + preflight counts now carry the class instead of an inline color, so a non-zero NO-GO / Optic-short count breathes red and punches through the void while advisory sits gold-static and clear sits green. .card-nogo modifier (--hud-edge-crit border + 3px red left-rail + 5% red tint, STATIC so 200 findings never animate at once) on PRE-FLIGHT NO-GO finding cards only. (3) NOW DOT: a pointer-events:none severity dot (#now-tn-dot) on the NOW bottom-nav item — crit (pulsing --red, purpose-built nowDotPulse keyframe, NOT vaPulse) when the active deployment has blockers / a cached PRE-FLIGHT NO-GO / a failed verdict; warn (--hud-hazard static) on advisories. nowDot_update() reads cheap localStorage, fired from showPage (every nav) + preflight_runUI; 44px tap target intact. All prefers-reduced-motion-gated. Existing tokens only, pitch-black preserved, no new CSS deps, no new background clutter (body dot-grid was rejected per the audit). Verified in Chrome. Built directly in Claude Code on v1.6.86 — sync web-Claude before next handback. node-checked; three stamps at v1.6.87.
